data.body: CHECKPOINT 9 — EPIC COMPLETE. d4de (fleshy-kimberlite-crayfish) CLOSED + signed (completion-verifier). All 6 children closed+signed: c1da(#661 ADR), d0e5(#665 delete-code), bcf0(#666 decommission-infra), 5e7a(#668 docs), f542(#669 safety-net), 03c6(#671 cutover). Discovered flake bug 19d7(#667) closed. Obsolete auto-lander bugs dc33/15a1/0d3e force-closed. LIVE: main submit_type=REBASE_IF_NECESSARY (was FFO), Autosubmit label+ACL+rebase-on-behalf removed, Verified copyCondition carries TRIVIAL_REBASE; autolander container/volumes/CloudWatch-alarm/SSM-param all destroyed (terraform plan empty); host stack healthy (gerrit+review-bot only). Auto-lander fully retired. Agents now land via plain Gerrit Submit once both votes green; Gerrit rebases server-side; post-merge main CI + manual revert (runbook infra/runbooks/main-red-post-merge.md) is the safety net.
